title: pilea shaferi
intro: Pilea shaferi, also known as Shafer's aluminum plant or Chinese iron, is a type of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and relieving pain. In herbal preparations, Pilea shaferi is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional folk medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
